workItem.author: marius-patrik
workItem.title: Draft: add prompt content for the implementer role
workItem.body: Populate the implementer role with concrete guidance and examples.
comments: Confirm the acceptance criteria are objective.

policy.branching: One worker = one issue = one branch = one PR; branch df/<issue>-<slug> from dev.
policy.enforcement: All merges require green CI and the configured review gate; never force-push or bypass gates.

output.schema: Return a verdict (ready or needs-changes) with concrete reasons for each gap.
